name: Poppy Seed Dressing - Sally's 1i24
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Poppy seed (add more if you
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, dry mustard, onion powder, cider vinegar, and lemon juice in a bowl.
2. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
3. Slowly add the salad oil while beating well.
4. The dressing will thicken as more oil is added.
5. Stir in the poppy seeds.
6. Store the dressing in the refrigerator.
7. Just before serving, shake to mix well.
8. This dressing pairs especially well with fruit or avocado salad.
9. It makes about 1 2/3 cups. Enjoy!!
